info.title: PhoneBlock API
info.description: Access to the PhoneBlock database for third-party tools. Please use the test installation at https://phoneblock.net/pb-test/api/ for testing purpose!

get.summary: Checks whether the given phone number in on the blocklist.

200.description: Checks whether the given phone number is in the PhoneBlock database.

get.summary: Checks a phone number hash against the SPAM database. This API provides better privacy than the direct lookup with the phone number.

200.description: Checks whether the phone number with the given SHA1 hash is in the PhoneBlock database. If the exact number is not found but prefix hashes are provided, range-based detection is attempted.

parameters.name: sha1
parameters.description: The hex-encoded SHA1 hash (40 hex digits) of the calling phone number to check for SPAM. The number to hash must be in international format (e.g. '3D1D76F0C3664E1E818C6ECCFD8843AD1F4091CC' for the German phone number '+4917650642602'). You can use the /hash API for testing and debugging your hash computation.

parameters.name: prefix10
parameters.description: Optional hex-encoded SHA1 hash (40 hex digits) of the phone number with the last digit removed. Used for range-based spam detection when the exact number is not in the database.

parameters.name: prefix100
parameters.description: Optional hex-encoded SHA1 hash (40 hex digits) of the phone number with the last two digits removed. Used for range-based spam detection when the exact number is not in the database.

get.summary: Retrieve extensive information for the given phone number.

200.description: Retrieves information for the given phone number from the PhoneBlock database.

get.summary: Retrieves the blocklist with optional incremental synchronization
get.description:
Returns all active phone numbers from the blocklist with their actual vote counts. Numbers below the server's minimum vote threshold are excluded from the full blocklist and returned with votes=0 in incremental updates (indicating removal). When 'since' is omitted, returns the complete blocklist. When 'since' is provided, returns only changes since that version (incremental sync). Entries with votes=0 indicate the number should be removed from the client's local blocklist.

**Important:** This endpoint returns only the community-maintained blocklist data. It does NOT include user-specific personalizations (personal blacklist/whitelist). For call filtering, clients must check BOTH the community blocklist AND the user's personal black/whitelist entries (retrieved via /api/blacklist and /api/whitelist). Personal whitelist entries should override community blocklist entries, and personal blacklist entries should block calls regardless of community ratings.

**Rate Limits:** To avoid excessive server load, clients should limit full synchronization (without 'since' parameter) to a maximum of once per month. Incremental synchronization (with 'since' parameter) should be performed at most once per day. Clients exceeding these limits may be subject to rate limiting.

**Implementation:** Perform an initial full sync to retrieve the complete blocklist and its version number. Store this data locally and save the version number. For subsequent updates, use the saved version number in the 'since' parameter to retrieve only changes. Apply the incremental updates to your local copy: add/update entries with votes > 0, remove entries with votes = 0. After each sync, update your saved version number to the one returned in the response.

200.description: Returns all active phone numbers from the PhoneBlock database with their actual vote counts. Numbers with votes=0 indicate removal.

votes.description: Actual vote count. A value of 0 indicates the number should be removed from the client's local blocklist.

lastActivity.description: Timestamp (milliseconds since epoch) of the last activity for this number

version.description: Current version of the blocklist for incremental synchronization

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Optional version number for incremental synchronization. When provided, returns only changes since the specified version. Entries with votes=0 indicate the number dropped below the minimum threshold and should be removed from the client's local blocklist.

get.summary: Retrieve information required to start a user registration

200.description: Starts a new registration session. The session ID must be added to all following requests during the user registration. The captcha data is a Base64 encoded image that hides a text that must be added to the registration information.

post.description: During registration, a user provides his e-mail address and an answer to a captcha challenge. The captcha challenge is a Base64 encoded image that must be retrieved with a GET request to the same URI prior to registration.

requestBody.description: User information to start the registration with.

200.description: An e-mail was successfully sent to the provided e-mail address. The e-mail contains a registration code, that the user must provide to the final call to the verify request to receive the login credentials.

post.description: A user registration must be verified by providing the code sent to the user's e-mail address. The login credentials required to access protected PhoneBlock resources is created as response to the verification call.

requestBody.description: Information that verifies that the user owns the provided e-mail address.

200.description: The user registration has completed successfully. The user may now use the provided credentials to access protected parts of the PhoneBlock API or log in to the web page to customize settings.

post.summary: Stores a user rating for a phone number

200.description: The rating has been stored successfully.

get.summary: Demonstrates hash computation for the /check API (for testing and debugging only, otherwise there is no privacy benefit).

200.description: Computes the encoded SHA1 hash of the given phone number. The phone number is normalized to international format before hash computation. E.g. for '004917650642602', or '017650642602' the hash of '+4917650642602' is computed.

get.summary: Checks connection and authentication. Call to this API can be used when setting up a PhoneBlock connection in a third-party app to verify the user has provided valid credentials.

200.description: Checks provided authentication token and returns 'ok' on success.

401.description: If no or invalid credentials have been provided.

get.summary: Retrieves the current user's account settings.
get.description: Returns language preference, country dial prefix, display name, and email address for the authenticated user.

401.description: If no or invalid credentials have been provided.

put.summary: Updates the current user's account settings.
put.description: Updates language preference, country dial prefix, or display name. All fields are optional. If countryCode is provided, the server converts it to the corresponding dial prefix.

requestBody.description: Account settings to update. All fields are optional.

200.description: Account settings updated successfully. Returns the updated settings.

400.description: Invalid request. Returns error message describing the validation failure.

invalidLang.value: Invalid language tag format. Expected format: 'de' or 'en-US'

invalidCountryCode.value: Invalid country code. Expected ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format (e.g., 'DE', 'US', 'BR')

invalidDialPrefix.value: Invalid dial prefix format. Expected format: '+XX' (e.g., '+49', '+1', '+351')

emptyDisplayName.value: Display name must not be empty

401.description: If no or invalid credentials have been provided.

get.summary: Retrieves the current user's personalized blacklist.
get.description: Returns a list of phone numbers that the user has explicitly marked as blocked (blacklist). Numbers are added to the blacklist by rating them via the POST /api/rate endpoint with spam ratings such as E_ADVERTISING, F_GAMBLE, or G_FRAUD. This endpoint only retrieves the list; use the rating API to add numbers.

401.description: If no or invalid credentials have been provided.

delete.summary: Removes a phone number from the user's blacklist.
delete.description: Deletes the specified phone number from the user's personalized blacklist. To add numbers to the blacklist, use POST /api/rate.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: The phone number to remove from the blacklist (e.g., +491234567890)

204.description: Phone number removed from blacklist successfully.

401.description: If no or invalid credentials have been provided.

404.description: Phone number not found in personalization list.

text/plain.example: Phone number not found in personalization list

put.summary: Updates the comment for a phone number in the user's blacklist.
put.description: Updates the user's comment for the specified phone number in their personalized blacklist.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: The phone number to update the comment for (e.g., +491234567890)

requestBody.description: Updated comment for the phone number

401.description: If no or invalid credentials have been provided.

404.description: Phone number not found in personalization list.

text/plain.example: Phone number not found in personalization list

get.summary: Retrieves the current user's personalized whitelist.
get.description: Returns a list of phone numbers that the user has explicitly marked as legitimate (whitelist). Numbers are added to the whitelist by rating them via the POST /api/rate endpoint with the A_LEGITIMATE rating. This endpoint only retrieves the list; use the rating API to add numbers.

401.description: If no or invalid credentials have been provided.

delete.summary: Removes a phone number from the user's whitelist.
delete.description: Deletes the specified phone number from the user's personalized whitelist. To add numbers to the whitelist, use POST /api/rate.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: The phone number to remove from the whitelist (e.g., +491234567893)

204.description: Phone number removed from whitelist successfully.

401.description: If no or invalid credentials have been provided.

404.description: Phone number not found in personalization list.

text/plain.example: Phone number not found in personalization list

put.summary: Updates the comment for a phone number in the user's whitelist.
put.description: Updates the user's comment for the specified phone number in their personalized whitelist.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: The phone number to update the comment for (e.g., +491234567893)

requestBody.description: Updated comment for the phone number

401.description: If no or invalid credentials have been provided.

404.description: Phone number not found in personalization list.

text/plain.example: Phone number not found in personalization list

PhoneInfo.description: Information about a phone number published by the PhoneBlock API.

votes.description: The number of votes that support blocking the requested number.

votesWildcard.description: Combined votes from the phone number's spam range. This value includes range-based aggregation and can be non-zero even when 'votes' is 0, indicating the number belongs to a known spam range.

rating.description: The rating for the requested phone number.

whiteListed.description: Whether this number is on the global white list and therefore cannot receive votes.

blackListed.description: Whether this number is on the requesting user's personal block list. Only set in the /check endpoint response.

archived.description: Whether this number no longer is on the blocklist, because no votes have been received for a long time.

dateAdded.description: Date when this number was added to the SPAM database (in milliseconds since epoch).

lastUpdate.description: Date when the last report for this number was received (in milliseconds since epoch).

label.description: The phone number formatted for local display (e.g., '(DE) 030 12345678').

location.description: The city or region from where the call originated (e.g., 'Berlin').

SearchResult.description: Extensive information about a phone number including community ratings, comments, and search history.

phoneId.description: The phone ID in database format.

topRating.description: The most common rating for this number.

ratings.description: Map of rating codes to vote counts.

searches.description: Monthly search activity counts (12 entries, most recent first).

aiSummary.description: AI-generated summary of user comments about this number.

relatedNumbers.description: Related phone numbers in the same range.

prev.description: Previous phone number in the database.

next.description: Next phone number in the database.

UpdateAccountRequest.description: Request to update user account settings. All fields are optional.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., 'DE', 'US', 'BR'). If provided, the server will convert it to the corresponding dial prefix.

NumberList.description: A list of phone numbers with optional comments (used for blacklist/whitelist responses)

numbers.description: List of phone numbers with optional comments

PersonalizedNumber.description: A phone number with optional user comment, display label, and rating

phone.description: The phone number in international format

label.description: The phone number formatted for local display (e.g., '(DE) 01234 567890')

comment.description: User's comment for this number (may be null)

rating.description: The user's personal rating for this number (may be null if no rating was given)

created.description: Timestamp when this entry was added to the personalization list (milliseconds since epoch).

PhoneBlockUser.description: A PhoneBlock user name and its password. The method of authorization is deprecated. Better use an API key.

APIKey.description: A PhoneBlock API key created for API access. You can create one from the settings page.
